puzzle.hint: A divine attribute paired with strengthened kingship and decisive speech in describing Prophet Solomon
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَشَدَدْنَا مُلْكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَفَصْلَ ٱلْخِطَابِ
puzzle.verse: 38:20 - And We strengthened his kingdom and gave him wisdom and discernment in speech.
